mapper.sql: id, title, author, release_date, publisher_id, create_at, update_at, version
b.id, b.title, b.author, b.release_date, b.publisher_id, p.publisher_name, b.update_at, b.version
mapper.select:
select
from book b inner join publisher p on b.publisher_id = p.id order by b.id

select
from book b inner join publisher p on b.publisher_id = p.id where b.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select count(*) from book where lower(title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%')
and release_date between #{releaseDateFrom,jdbcType=DATE} and #{releaseDateTo,jdbcType=DATE}

select
from book where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} for update nowait
mapper.insert: insert into book (title, author, release_date, publisher_id, create_at, update_at, version) values ( #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{publisherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
